HoverPower.UI.Title: Mochi's Blue Scrubber
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Info:
Toggle tooltips on/off. Default Hotkeys:
 open panel= H, surface toggle = L
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Close: Close/Exit. Default hotkey: H or click on the Game top-left icon does the same.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: Outline: click to reset color and alpha to game defaults.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetFill: Fill: click to reset to 0% (game default).
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: Opacity of the fill inside the hovered outline. 0% = no inner fill, 100% = full fill.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: Guidelines: click to reset to mod defaults (40%). Synced with Options menu slider.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity: Guidelines opacity. Below 15% is not advised because the guides may become hard to see.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.SurfaceToggle:
Hide Surface tool boundary preview fill.
Default hotkey: L.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Preset1: Slot 1 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Preset2: Slot 2 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetPresets: Reset both preset slots back to the original mod defaults.
